source_pr.title: expression, plan: extract the same part from DNF's leaves.
source_pr.body:
e.g.
`select * from t1, t2 where (t1.a=t2.a and ...) or (t1.a=t2.a and ...) or (t1.a=t2.a and ...)`
We should extract the `t1.a=t2.a` out of the DNF, so it can be used as the join's join key condition.
And this let tidb push more predicates across the join.

~~I'll add enough tests in next commit.~~
~~Unit test is not easy to see what predicates join holds, add explain tests in integration test is a better choice i think.~~
Unit test added.

PTAL @hanfei1991 @lamxTyler @zz-jason

fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sort.Slice(afterFunc, func(i, j int) bool { (expression/integration_test.go)
